visual_thesis: A calm aerospace intelligence console: dark space-like depth for the graph view, bright restrained analytical surfaces for charts, and minimal text that lets patterns surface first.
readability_goal: A first-time user should understand the leading fields, leading publication countries, Korea gap candidates, and newest monitoring signals within 30 seconds.

geography_strategy.default_display_rule: Show major jurisdictions first, then top emerging countries, then Other. Do not crowd the first screen with every country.
geography_strategy.region_display_rule: Use 권역별 as the UI term instead of 대륙별 because EP and WO are special patent jurisdictions.
geography_strategy.long_tail_signal: Surface smaller countries only when recent growth, assignee concentration, or field specialization is meaningful.

pages.job: 전체 항공우주 특허 현황을 가장 빠르게 이해하게 한다.
선택 분야가 왜 중요한지, 어느 국가/기관이 강한지, 한국 기회가 있는지 보여준다.
공개국가 기준과 출원인국가 기준을 혼동하지 않고 비교한다.
전세계 데이터를 권역 단위로 먼저 요약하고, 의미 있는 국가만 드릴다운한다.
분야, 국가, 출원인, 특허 패밀리의 연결을 은하수처럼 탐색한다.
분석에서 발견한 분야를 더 깊게 검색한다.

readability_rules: Use one sequential color scale, not multi-hue rainbow.
Show row totals at the right edge.
Pin Korea row/column comparison in the tooltip.
Default to top 6 fields plus Other if the chart becomes crowded.
Use direct labels at the right edge instead of a distant legend.
Allow switching to line chart for precise comparison.

charts.primary_question: 각 공개국가는 어떤 분야 포트폴리오를 갖고 있는가?
readability_rules: Use percentage for mix, raw count in tooltip.
Default country order: US, EP, CN, JP, KR, top emerging countries, then Other.
Add a basis label: 공개국가 기준.
Use 권역별, not 대륙별, because patent jurisdictions are not pure geography.
Keep EP and WO explanatory notes visible in tooltips.
Show all regions, but keep country drill-down one click away.

charts.primary_question: 주요국 밖에서 빠르게 커지는 국가/권역 신호는 무엇인가?
readability_rules: Show only countries passing minimum family count and growth thresholds.
Avoid overclaiming: label as 관찰 신호 or 성장 후보.
Link each card to field detail and patent search results.

charts.primary_question: 세계적으로 뜨는데 한국 공개/출원인 신호가 약한 분야는 어디인가?
readability_rules: Use 후보 wording, not definitive weakness wording.
Add short explanation sentence per row.
Show publication-country and assignee-country shares side by side.
Separate public research and private company tabs.
Normalize common aliases before ranking.
Use family count as default, publication count as secondary.

charts.primary_question: 이번 달 새로 공개된 중요한 문헌은 무엇인가?
readability_rules: Show at most 8 items on the home page.
Each item shows title, publication country, field, assignee, and why it matters.
Mark this as publication_date 기준.

charts.primary_question: 분야, 국가, 출원인, 특허 패밀리는 어떻게 연결되는가?
readability_rules: Initial graph shows only field, country, and top assignee nodes.
Patent publication nodes appear only after zoom/focus.
Clicking a field moves camera to the cluster and opens the report drawer.
Use opacity and size to reduce visual noise, not more colors.

analysis_home: KPI numbers count in once after data load.
Heatmap cells fade in by field row.
Right-side report drawer uses shared transition from selected chart cell.
graph_view: Field cluster selection triggers camera fly-to.
Unrelated nodes fade to 15 percent opacity.
Report drawer opens after camera settles, not simultaneously.

visual_system.surface: light analytical dashboard by default; graph view uses dark canvas.
visual_system.palette: field colors are accents only; charts use restrained sequential scales.
visual_system.typography: small dense labels, clear numeric hierarchy, no oversized dashboard hero text.
visual_system.cards: use cards only for report summaries, watchlist items, and drawers; charts live in clean sections.
